backstory.original: Vin Ursa is one of the deadliest bounty hunters in Wildspace. Raised by autognome thieves and trained by a former Xaryxian assassin, Vin has all the skills she needs to get the job done. To keep those skills honed, she spends much of her off time in the Arena of Blood. If there's one thing you should hope for in Wildspace, it's to avoid ending up on the wrong side of her L.A.S.E.R. sight. She's built her renown fighting some of the most terrifying creatures this side of the Abyss and has a long list of Favored Foes to show for it.
backstory.display: 文·乌尔萨是蛮荒太空最致命的赏金猎人之一。她被机器侏儒小偷抚养成人并接受了萨雷西斯刺客的训练，拥有完成任务所需的一切技能。为了不让自己的技能变生疏，她把自己大量休息时间都花在了血之竞技场。如果说在蛮荒太空有什么可以抓住的救命稻草，那就是不要让她的激光枪的枪口对着你。与深渊这边一些最可怕的生物战斗令她名声大噪，而且长长的偏好对手名单能够证明这一点。

description.original: Vin Ursa uses her Light Accelerating Spectral Energy Relay to attack a random enemy.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨使用她的光加速光谱能量中继器攻击一个随机敌人。

description.original: Vin Ursa blasts an enemy and has a chance to make that enemy a favored foe.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨轰击一名敌人，且有几率将该敌人变成她的偏好对手。

longDescription.original: Vin Ursa blasts an enemy. She has a +20% chance to score a critical hit and the enemy becomes a favored foe if she crits.
longDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨轰击一名敌人。她有 20% 几率造成暴击，并在暴击后将敌人变成她的偏好对手。

description.original: Vin Ursa picks a random monster type as her favored foe. She can add additional favored foe types by using her ultimate ability.
description.display: 文·乌尔萨随机挑选一种怪物类型作为她的偏好对手。她可以使用其杀招技能增加其他偏好对手类型。

description.original: Vin Ursa increases the effect of her buffs whenever Bounty Contracts are used with her in the formation.
description.display: 当文·乌尔萨在阵型中使用奖金契约时，她会提高自身增益的效果。

description.desc: $source can be used in any Light of Xaryxis campaign adventure or variant, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
$source将可用于任何萨雷西斯之光战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
$source increases the damage of all Champions in the front two columns by $(amount)%.
$source使前两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa focuses her efforts on the front-most columns of the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨将她的精力投入到阵型的前几列。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of all Champions in the rear two columns by $(amount)%.
$source使后两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa focuses her efforts on the rear-most columns of the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨将她的精力投入到阵型的后几列。

description.pre: $source picks a random monster type from a monster in the current adventure as her Favored Foe. Her Favored Foes drop $(amount___3)% extra gold and all Champions deal $(amount___2)% damage to them.
$source在当前冒险中随机挑选一种怪物类型，作为她的偏好对手。她的偏好对手会额外掉落 $(amount___3)% 金币，而且所有勇士对其造成 $(amount___2)% 伤害。

tipText.original: Vin Ursa picks a random monster type as her favored foe. She can add additional Favored Foe types by using her ultimate ability.
tipText.display: 文·乌尔萨随机挑选一种怪物类型作为她的偏好对手。她可以使用其杀招技能增加其他偏好对手类型。

description.desc: $source increases the effect of your Deck specialization by $(amount)% for each Favored Foe she has, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack multiplier.
对于她拥有的每个偏好对手，$source会使甲板专精的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式叠加。增益作用于叠加前的数值。

Whenever you use a Bounty Contract with $source in the formation, Vin Ursa increases the effect of your Deck specialization by $(not_buffed amount)% until the end of the current adventure, stacking multiplicatively. Caps at 100 stacks.
当你对阵型中的$source使用奖金契约时，文·乌尔萨会使卡牌组专精的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，直到当前冒险结束为止，以乘算方式叠加。最多叠加 100 次。

tipText.original: Vin Ursa increases the effect of her buffs whenever Bounty Contracts are used with her in the formation.
tipText.display: 当文·乌尔萨在阵型中使用奖金契约时，她会提高自身增益的效果。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Evil Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使邪恶阵营勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa likes to hang with a rather sadistic crowd.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨喜欢和有施虐倾向的朋友鬼混。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa likes to hang with Champions who like to keep their options open.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨喜欢和思想开放的勇士待在一起。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of Good Champions by $(amount)%.
$source使善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Vin Ursa reluctantly hangs out with Champions that have a moral code.
specializationDescription.display: 文·乌尔萨不喜欢和坚持道德准则的勇士一起玩。

description.original: Most of the time this would cost you, but I'll save these autognomes for free.
description.display: 通常来说这种事要价很高，不过我会免费去救那些机器侏儒。

description.original: I'm in charge because I have the cool coat.
description.display: 我管事是因为我的外套很帅。

description.original: I bring my own stein to taverns -- why pay for a new one every time?
description.display: 我去酒馆都带自己的啤酒杯--何必每次都买新的？

description.original: I don't need luck! ...No wait, I totally do -- give me more luck.
description.display: 我不需要幸运！不等等，我还挺需要的--再多给我些幸运。

description.original: I don't really make a plan, I just kinda go in and hope for the best and things work out.
description.display: 我不怎么制定计划，我就直接动手，希望一切顺利。

description.original: I've been in a LOT of fights. Want to see my completed bounty list?
description.display: 我打过很多很多的架。想看看我已经完成的赏金名单吗？

description.original: Oh, another giff! I love fighting giff -- they're always tough!
description.display: 哦，又是个吉夫人！我就喜欢跟吉夫人打，他们都很强悍！

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: This reminds me of my last fight with a construct...
description.display: 这让我想起上次跟一个构装生物的战斗了......

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Once you've fought one mind flayer, the rest are easy.
description.display: 你跟夺心魔战斗过一次之后，接下来就简单了。

effects.description: Increases the extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You'll learn when to strike. And more importantly, when not to.
description.display: 你会学会什么时候该出手的。还有更重要的是，什么时候不该出手。

description.original: It's over -- don't try it.
description.display: 结束了，别挣扎了。

description.original: Anyone else want to negotiate?
description.display: 还有谁想谈判的？

description.original: We can do this one of two ways...
description.display: 现在有两种方式可以选......

description.original: And sometimes business is personal.
description.display: 有时候，生意就是私人恩怨。

description.original: Did anyone see where the spelljammer went?
description.display: 有人看到魔法船去哪儿了吗？

description.original: I'm a simple plasmoid making my way through wildspace.
description.display: 我只是一个在狂野太空中闯荡的普通等离子粒团。

description.original: Someone told me bounty hunters wear hats. This is what I could afford.
description.display: 我听人说赏金猎人都要戴帽子。我只买得起这个。

description.original: There are a few more ray gun marks than I thought on this...
description.display: 这上面的射线枪痕迹比我以为的要多......

description.original: Someone ran at the sight of my hat. It was awesome! I have a look now!
description.display: 有人一看见我的帽子就跑了。太酷啦！我现在有穿搭了！

description.original: For when you need a new face. Or a face at all.
description.display: 在需要改头换面的时候用。或者就是需要有头有脸的时候。

description.original: Nicked this off a guard who wasn't looking. It's got armor inside!
description.display: 这是从一个粗心的守卫那里顺来的。里面还有装甲呢！

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I genuinely cannot believe how many hits this coat has taken.
description.display: 我是真的不敢相信这件外套承受了多少伤害。

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I found a plasmoid tailor to make this for me. They knew how to keep me flowing.
description.display: 我找了个等离子叛徒帮我做的这个。这人很懂得怎么让我飘浮在空中。

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: This lets me seep into the shadows and also watches my back for me.
description.display: 它让我能融入暗影之中，还能保护我的后背。

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I can't afford anything better -- so this will have to do.
description.display: 我买不起更好的东西，所以只能将就用这个。

description.original: I'm way better with this thing than I should be.
description.display: 它让我超常发挥。

description.original: This thing is so cool! Is it too cool for me? Ah! It's so cool!
description.display: 这玩意好酷！会不会对我来说太酷了？啊！它真的好酷！

description.original: This was specially designed for me by my dad. It was the last thing he made.
description.display: 这是我爸专门给我设计的。这是他的最后一件作品。

description.original: This was our last score before the team was wiped out...
description.display: 这是我们的队伍被团灭之前的最后战利品......

description.original: There's not much of this left. I need more contracts. Fast.
description.display: 剩下的也没多少了。我需要更多工作。尽快。

description.original: Each of these comes from a member of my autognome family.
description.display: 每件装备都来自我的一个机器侏儒家族成员。

description.original: Old Vocath looked really annoyed when he had to present this to me.
description.display: 老沃卡斯不得不把这个给我的时候，他看起来非常恼火。

description.original: You'd be surprised how many bounties just walk into a tavern you're already in.
description.display: 你在一家酒馆的时候，走进来的悬赏对象多得令人惊讶。

description.original: I broke the last one over a giff's head. Got this one for free from Large Luigi.
description.display: 我的上一个马克杯在一个吉夫人的脑袋上敲坏了。这个是在大块头路易吉那里免费拿的。

description.original: Have you been to Eberron? That place is WILD!
description.display: 你去过艾伯伦吗？那地方太野了！

description.original: I just found this place, and I never wanted to leave. SO MANY TAVERNS!
description.display: 我刚发现这个地方，就再也不想离开了。这么多的酒馆！

description.original: Until I'm in a guild, these will have to do for contracts.
description.display: 在我加入公会之前，这些只能做合同工了。

description.original: I still hang onto this all these years later.
description.display: 这么多年过去了，我还保留着它。

description.original: Wildspace is REALLY big. This helps me find a bounty anywhere.
description.display: 蛮荒太空真的非常大。它可以帮我在任何地方找到悬赏对象。

description.original: Some bounties require assurance that they stay on this plane.
description.display: 需要确保某些悬赏对象留在这个位面。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Vin Ursa is one of the deadliest bounty hunters in Wildspace. Raised by autognome thieves and trained by a former Xaryxian assassin, Vin has all the skills she needs to get the job done. To keep those skills honed, she spends much of her off time in the Arena of Blood. If there's one thing you should hope for in Wildspace, it's to avoid ending up on the wrong side of her L.A.S.E.R. sight. She's built her renown fighting some of the most terrifying creatures this side of the Abyss and has a long list of Favored Foes to show for it.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Vin Ursa is a support and gold find Champion who builds up a ledger of Favored Foes as you progress through each adventure.

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Most of the time this would cost you, but I'll save these autognomes for free.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 通常来说这种事要价很高，不过我会免费去救那些机器侏儒。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: I'm in charge because I have the cool coat.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我管事是因为我的外套很帅。

original.name: Frugal
original.description: I bring my own stein to taverns -- why pay for a new one every time?

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 我去酒馆都带自己的啤酒杯--何必每次都买新的？

original.name: Lucky
original.description: I don't need luck! ...No wait, I totally do -- give me more luck.

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 我不需要幸运！不等等，我还挺需要的--再多给我些幸运。

original.name: Tactical Prowess
original.description: I don't really make a plan, I just kinda go in and hope for the best and things work out.

display.name: 战术英勇
display.description: 我不怎么制定计划，我就直接动手，希望一切顺利。

original.name: Battle Expertise
original.description: I've been in a LOT of fights. Want to see my completed bounty list?

display.name: 战斗专长
display.description: 我打过很多很多的架。想看看我已经完成的赏金名单吗？

original.name: Have I Fought You Before?
original.description: Oh, another giff! I love fighting giff -- they're always tough!

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 我跟你打过架吗？
display.description: 哦，又是个吉夫人！我就喜欢跟吉夫人打，他们都很强悍！

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Old Faces, New Battles
original.description: This reminds me of my last fight with a construct...

effects.description: Increases the damage of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 老熟人，新战斗
display.description: 这让我想起上次跟一个构装生物的战斗了......

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Muscle Memory
original.description: Once you've fought one mind flayer, the rest are easy.

effects.description: Increases the extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 肌肉记忆
display.description: 你跟夺心魔战斗过一次之后，接下来就简单了。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能额外金币提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Timing is Everything
original.description: You'll learn when to strike. And more importantly, when not to.

display.name: 时机决定一切
display.description: 你会学会什么时候该出手的。还有更重要的是，什么时候不该出手。

original.name: High Ground
original.description: It's over -- don't try it.

display.name: 高地
display.description: 结束了，别挣扎了。

original.name: Aggressive Negotiations
original.description: Anyone else want to negotiate?

display.name: 激进谈判
display.description: 还有谁想谈判的？

original.name: This is the Way
original.description: We can do this one of two ways...

display.name: 此乃正道
display.description: 现在有两种方式可以选......

original.name: It's Just Business
original.description: And sometimes business is personal.

display.name: 生意而已
display.description: 有时候，生意就是私人恩怨。

original.name: All Hands!
original.description: Did anyone see where the spelljammer went?

display.name: 全员出动！
display.description: 有人看到魔法船去哪儿了吗？

original.name: Orbital Ooze
original.description: I'm a simple plasmoid making my way through wildspace.

display.name: 轨道泥怪
display.description: 我只是一个在狂野太空中闯荡的普通等离子粒团。

original.name: Traveler's Fedora
original.description: Someone told me bounty hunters wear hats. This is what I could afford.

display.name: 旅行者软呢帽
display.description: 我听人说赏金猎人都要戴帽子。我只买得起这个。

original.name: Lucky Cap
original.description: There are a few more ray gun marks than I thought on this...

display.name: 幸运帽
display.description: 这上面的射线枪痕迹比我以为的要多......

original.name: Bounty Hunter Hat
original.description: Someone ran at the sight of my hat. It was awesome! I have a look now!

display.name: 赏金猎人帽
display.description: 有人一看见我的帽子就跑了。太酷啦！我现在有穿搭了！

original.name: Hat of Disguise
original.description: For when you need a new face. Or a face at all.

display.name: 伪装帽
display.description: 在需要改头换面的时候用。或者就是需要有头有脸的时候。

original.name: Security Coat
original.description: Nicked this off a guard who wasn't looking. It's got armor inside!

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 安保外套
display.description: 这是从一个粗心的守卫那里顺来的。里面还有装甲呢！

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害和额外金币提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Well Worn Coat
original.description: I genuinely cannot believe how many hits this coat has taken.

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 陈旧外套
display.description: 我是真的不敢相信这件外套承受了多少伤害。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害和额外金币提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Plasmoid Jacket
original.description: I found a plasmoid tailor to make this for me. They knew how to keep me flowing.

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 等离子夹克
display.description: 我找了个等离子叛徒帮我做的这个。这人很懂得怎么让我飘浮在空中。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害和额外金币提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Cloak of Stars and Darkness
original.description: This lets me seep into the shadows and also watches my back for me.

effects.description: Increases the damage and extra gold from $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 星与暗斗篷
display.description: 它让我能融入暗影之中，还能保护我的后背。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能伤害和额外金币提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Compact Wrist Bow
original.description: I can't afford anything better -- so this will have to do.

display.name: 紧凑腕弓
display.description: 我买不起更好的东西，所以只能将就用这个。

original.name: Dead Eye Crossbow
original.description: I'm way better with this thing than I should be.

display.name: 死亡之眼十字弩
display.description: 它让我超常发挥。

original.name: L.A.S.E.R. Wrist Array
original.description: This thing is so cool! Is it too cool for me? Ah! It's so cool!

display.name: 激光腕带
display.description: 这玩意好酷！会不会对我来说太酷了？啊！它真的好酷！

original.name: Starstrike Array
original.description: This was specially designed for me by my dad. It was the last thing he made.

display.name: 星击服饰
display.description: 这是我爸专门给我设计的。这是他的最后一件作品。

original.name: Heist Score
original.description: This was our last score before the team was wiped out...

display.name: 抢劫战利品
display.description: 这是我们的队伍被团灭之前的最后战利品......

original.name: Remaining Stash
original.description: There's not much of this left. I need more contracts. Fast.

display.name: 剩余私藏
display.description: 剩下的也没多少了。我需要更多工作。尽快。

original.name: Family Gears
original.description: Each of these comes from a member of my autognome family.

display.name: 家族装备
display.description: 每件装备都来自我的一个机器侏儒家族成员。

original.name: Arena of Blood Coin
original.description: Old Vocath looked really annoyed when he had to present this to me.

display.name: 血之竞技场钱币
display.description: 老沃卡斯不得不把这个给我的时候，他看起来非常恼火。

original.name: Happy Beholder Mug
original.description: You'd be surprised how many bounties just walk into a tavern you're already in.

display.name: 欢乐眼魔马克杯
display.description: 你在一家酒馆的时候，走进来的悬赏对象多得令人惊讶。

original.name: Replacement Mug
original.description: I broke the last one over a giff's head. Got this one for free from Large Luigi.

display.name: 替代马克杯
display.description: 我的上一个马克杯在一个吉夫人的脑袋上敲坏了。这个是在大块头路易吉那里免费拿的。

original.name: Goblinpunk Stein
original.description: Have you been to Eberron? That place is WILD!

display.name: 地精朋克啤酒杯
display.description: 你去过艾伯伦吗？那地方太野了！

original.name: Infinity's Souvenir
original.description: I just found this place, and I never wanted to leave. SO MANY TAVERNS!

display.name: 不朽旅店的纪念品
display.description: 我刚发现这个地方，就再也不想离开了。这么多的酒馆！

original.name: Active Bounty
original.description: Until I'm in a guild, these will have to do for contracts.

display.name: 活跃赏金
display.description: 在我加入公会之前，这些只能做合同工了。

original.name: First Bounty Poster
original.description: I still hang onto this all these years later.

display.name: 第一张悬赏海报
display.description: 这么多年过去了，我还保留着它。

original.name: Wildspace Scrying Stone
original.description: Wildspace is REALLY big. This helps me find a bounty anywhere.

display.name: 蛮荒太空探知石
display.description: 蛮荒太空真的非常大。它可以帮我在任何地方找到悬赏对象。

original.name: Dimensional Shackles
original.description: Some bounties require assurance that they stay on this plane.

display.name: 位面枷锁
display.description: 需要确保某些悬赏对象留在这个位面。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Nonbinary Champions by $(amount)%
所有非二元性别勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%
使所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
